metadata.author: Paul
metadata.subject: Experiencing Christ — Taking Christ as Our Living, Pattern, Goal, and Power.

1: For to me, to live is Christ and to die is gain.
2: Have this mind in you, which was also in Christ Jesus,
Who, existing in the form of God... emptied Himself, taking the form of a slave, becoming in the likeness of men.
3: But what things were gains to me, these I have counted as loss on account of Christ.
I pursue toward the goal for the prize of the high calling of God in Christ Jesus.
4: I am able to do all things in Him who empowers me.

21.text: Paul’s life was not just 'for' Christ, but was Christ Himself being lived out through his human body.

13.text: The Christ who empowers us is the indwelling, resurrected Lord who makes us sufficient for any circumstance, whether in abundance or in lack.
